ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy order */,
  "order_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of order (e.g., production, maintenance) */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the order was processed */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Exact start time of the order */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Exact end time of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., ongoing, completed, cancelled) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the order */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "kwh" REAL /* Kilowatt-hours (KWH) consumed by the order */,
  "costs" REAL /* Costs associated with the order */,
  "pl" REAL /* Power level (PL) during the order */,
  "pf" REAL /* Power factor (PF) during the order */,
  "pk" INTEGER /* Peak kilowatt-hours (PK) during the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_orders_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_orders_order_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_type_id") REFERENCES order_types ("order_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_types" (
  "order_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order type */,
  "order_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the order type (e.g., Production, Maintenance) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Broad category of the order type (e.g., production, maintenance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the order type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the facility */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Maximum energy capacity of the facility */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager responsible for the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_breakdowns" (
  "cost_breakdown_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost breakdown */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy order the cost breakdown belongs to */,
  "cost_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cost category */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount associated with the cost category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cost item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_breakdown_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_breakdowns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES energy_orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_breakdowns_cost_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_category_id") REFERENCES cost_categories ("cost_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_categories" (
  "cost_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost category */,
  "cost_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the cost category (e.g., Electricity, Maintenance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cost category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy order the report belongs to */,
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report type */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_reports_report_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_type_id") REFERENCES report_types ("report_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_reports_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES energy_orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type (e.g., Daily, Monthly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, data analyst, maintenance staff) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy order being accessed */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed (if applicable) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the order or report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the order or report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES energy_orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES energy_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "external_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy order the external data is associated with */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source (e.g., weather, utility bill) */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the external data */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the external data */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the external data */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the external data source if available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES energy_orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Weather, Utility Bill) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)
